headline: Why Xylem (XYL) Fits the AI Water Strain Theme Through Reuse and Industrial Water Management
summary: Xylem Inc. (NYSE:XYL) is one of the best water infrastructure stocks to buy as AI data centers strain resources. On June 8, 2026, the company expanded its long-term partnership with Dow to design, build, and operate advanced water systems at Dow’s large-scale industrial complex in Fort Saskatchewan, Alberta. The project will support Dow’s Path2Zero operations […]
